subject: Green alien creature with spiky protrusions, large clawed hands, and a wide predatory mouth in an aggressive crouching stance
description: A hulking green alien creature crouches in an aggressive, predatory stance. The figure is clearly non-humanoid: it has large clawed hands, spiky protrusions extending from its body, and a wide mouth. The body is heavily built and green-skinned. The background features bright pinkish-magenta energy or aura effects radiating outward, contrasting sharply with the creature's green coloring. The composition is a mid-shot that captures the creature's full torso and outstretched arms, conveying imminent threat and barely-contained aggression.
foreground: hulking green alien creature, spiky protrusions, clawed hands, aggressive crouch
background: bright magenta-pink energy aura, radiant light effects
emotion: predatory, aggressive, hunger — crouching ready-to-pounce body language
